arts.ttl: Tony Mowbray opens up on Blackburn Rovers’ previous attempt to sign West Brom star
arts.sum: West Brom boss Tony Mowbray has revealed he tried to sign Josh Maja at former club Blackburn Rovers… The post Tony Mowbray opens up on Blackburn Rovers’ previous attempt to sign West Brom star appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Tony Mowbray reveals Josh Maja transfer near miss as West Brom striker dilemma nears
arts.sum: Tony Mowbray is looking forward to working with West Bromwich Albion forward Josh Maja in due course - having revealed that he came oh so close to recruiting him previously in his managerial career. Mowbray has been a fan of Maja for a while, certainly pre-dating this, his second spell in charge of the club, and he revealed that, while at Blackburn Rovers, he came close to signing him.

arts.ttl: Blackburn Rovers player rules out move to specific league – Already snubbed two clubs
arts.sum: On Friday, Blackburn Rovers omitted Arnór Sigurðsson from their 25-man squad for the Championship. The winger was frustrated and surprised with Blackburn Rovers’ decision and stated they have left him in an ‘impossible situation’. The transfer windows across the major European leagues have closed, making it difficult for him to find a new club.
